reason: Full notebook execution passed with clean hard gates. UNKNOWN_0 policy-table fitting now excludes deterministic holdout decisions, and holdout evaluation remains nonzero with comparable correctness on hits versus v0-05d5.
known_risks: This promotes a cleaner validation protocol, not proven gameplay strength.
Policy hit coverage dropped after removing holdout from table fitting.
Runtime policy hits remain sparse in local variant smoke, so direct game impact is still limited.
Local confirm win-rate is noisy against simple local opponents.
next_candidates: Use leakage-free split evaluation to tune UNKNOWN_0 policy table thresholds on train/valid only.
Add deterministic baseline-vs-candidate local head-to-head seeds.
Investigate option-type-only policy correctness ceiling and whether same-type ambiguity limits runtime gains.
